name: registry-mode parses every entry in a *-URLS.yaml file and drives the per-URL pipeline once for each
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o08-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Rule x
prose.
MD
cat > $OUT/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml <<YAML
sources:
- id: entry-alpha
  name: A
  jurisdiction: us-government
  url: $OUT/src.md
  authoritative_publisher: PubA
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: entry-beta
  name: B
  jurisdiction: european-union
  url: $OUT/src.md
  authoritative_publisher: PubB
  fetch_frequency: daily
YAML
cd $OUT && CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; grep -q 'total=2 processed=2' e.err && echo registry-mode-parses-entries 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/entry-alpha.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/entry-beta.yaml
